segment_summary: This segment demonstrates a Kubernetes vulnerability (CVE-2019-11253) that can lead to a denial of service. The speaker executes a script that sends a large number of self-subject access review requests to the Kubernetes API server. This action is intended to exhaust the API server's threads and cause it to become unresponsive, effectively demonstrating a denial-of-service attack.
